---
title: "Pet Mobility Agent / 带宠出行决策系统"
subtitle: "狗狗需求完成图谱与带宠出行决策 PRD"
date: "2026-06-13 10:29:42"
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss"
version: "第 2 版"
lang: zh-CN
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    toc-location: left
    toc-title: 目录
    number-sections: true
    number-depth: 3
    theme: cosmo
    css: styles.css
    embed-resources: true
    fontsize: 1.05em
    linestretch: 1.6
    code-fold: false
    link-external-newwindow: true
execute:
  echo: false
---

<!--
正文内容由同目录的 Markdown 源文件同步引入。
请编辑 docs/prd-pet-mobility-agent.md，不要在本文件复制或改写正文。
-->

<div class="prd-title-meta" aria-label="文档元信息">
  <div class="prd-title-meta-label">发布于</div>
  <div class="prd-title-meta-label prd-title-meta-right">版本</div>
  <div class="prd-title-meta-value">2026-06-13 10:29:42</div>
  <div class="prd-title-meta-value prd-title-meta-right">第 2 版</div>
</div>

{{< include prd-pet-mobility-agent.md >}}
